Clinical relevance: Near-perfect discrimination between ASD and TC at the slice level
Model detects 95.6% of ASD slices — high for a screening tool
97.2% of TC slices correctly cleared — low false alarm burden
4.4% of ASD slices missed — these are the clinically costly errors
Precision/PPV relevant for resource allocation and follow-up decisions
Note: slice-level ≠ subject-level; aggregation needed for clinical use
